advisoryGroups.name: glib VariantStrIter soundness
advisoryGroups.platformScope: Linux compatibility builds only; absent from both macOS release target graphs
advisoryGroups.reachability: Neither application source nor the downloaded transitive dependency sources call Variant::array_iter_str or VariantStrIter; only glib's own implementation and tests reference it
advisoryGroups.disposition: Retain as a visible cargo-audit warning until Tauri's Linux GUI graph can use glib >=0.20

advisoryGroups.name: GTK3 binding maintenance
advisoryGroups.dependencyPath: GTK3 bindings -> GTK / WebKitGTK / Tao / Wry -> Tauri 2.11
advisoryGroups.platformScope: Linux compatibility builds only; absent from both macOS release target graphs
advisoryGroups.reachability: Compiled and reachable on Linux compatibility builds, but not included in supported macOS release artifacts
advisoryGroups.disposition: Time-bounded cargo-deny exceptions; remove when Tauri no longer selects the unmaintained GTK3 graph

advisoryGroups.name: proc-macro-error maintenance
advisoryGroups.platformScope: Transitive build dependency of the Linux GTK3 graph
advisoryGroups.reachability: Build-time procedural macro only; no runtime application code
advisoryGroups.disposition: Time-bounded cargo-deny exception; remove with the GTK3 dependency graph

advisoryGroups.name: rust-unic maintenance
advisoryGroups.dependencyPath: rust-unic 0.9 crates -> unic-ucd-ident -> urlpattern 0.3.0 -> tauri-utils 2.9.3 -> Tauri 2.11
advisoryGroups.platformScope: Transitive Tauri build and URL-pattern graph on supported and compatibility targets
advisoryGroups.reachability: Used transitively for generated Tauri URL-pattern validation; no direct application dependency
advisoryGroups.disposition: Time-bounded cargo-deny exceptions; remove when Tauri replaces urlpattern's rust-unic graph
